title: UK NHS Trust — block-contract tariff, attribution stress
description: UK NHS Trust pathology (180k slides/yr, £105k consultant salary). NHS block-contract tariff means LOS savings do NOT flow back to the pathology department P&L. Tests the attribution framework: patient_flow should either zero out or be surfaced as hospital-captured, not departmental.

comparative.sectra_coverage: partial — EU-anchored but no block-contract attribution

expected.notes: patient_flow pillar is the attribution stress target — expected to be suppressed or explicitly marked hospital-captured under NHS block contracting; see Finding F-01
